results.rendered_html:
1. sapakṣa (2. sa + pakṣa) m.
1〉 Anhänger, Freund; s. sapakṣatā und sapakṣatva.
— 2〉 Theilnehmer, mit einem Andern in gleichem Falle sich befindend  SIDDH. K. _zu_ P. 6,3,84 .  TARKAS. 39 . 41 .  SĀH. D. 55,19 . 122,10 . 14 .  BHĀṢĀP. 72 .
— Vgl. 1. vipakṣa.

results.rendered_html:
2. sapakṣa (wie eben) adj.
1〉 mit Flügeln versehen  R. 5,85,12 .  Spr. (II) 1193  (zugleich in Bed. 2). Berge  MBH. 7,1163 .  HARIV. 12600 .  R. 2,89,20 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 32,3 .  KATHĀS. 26,9 . 27,137 . 120,84 .
— 2〉 einen Anhang habend  Spr. (II) 1193 .
— Vgl. 2. vipakṣa.

results.rendered_html:
sapakṣa a.
1 Winged, having wings.
2 Having a side or party.
3 Belonging to the same side or party.
4 (Hence) Kindred, like, similar (fig.); daladdrākṣātiryadrasarbharasapakṣā bhaṇitayaḥ  Bv. 2. 77. 
5 Containing the pakṣa or subject of an inference.
— kṣaḥ
1 An adherent, a follower, partisan.
2 A kindred, a kinsman; paritrātastvayā sapakṣaḥ  M. 4. 
3 (In logic) An instance on the same side, a similar instance; niścitasādhyavān sapakṣaḥ  T. S.
